markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore Apollo.io's capabilities for consolidating GrowthX's tech stack and enhancing their CRM and outreach processes.](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Apollo.io offers comprehensive CRM features, including intent data, website visitor tracking, and HubSpot integration](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $4,284/year for 3 users (paid annually) with flexible credit system for emails and mobile numbers](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Trial extended to 10 days to allow for team evaluation and testing of the platform](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Apollo lacks direct WhatsApp integration but offers workarounds for manual task creation](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

## Topics

### Apollo.io's Core Functionalities

  - [231 million contact database, updated every 32 days](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [98% accuracy on verified data (green check marks)](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Filters for job postings, hiring status, and ideal customer profiles](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Buying intent data from LeadSift and Bombora, updated weekly](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Website visitor tracking with potential contact suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Workflow automation for ongoing lead generation and sequencing](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

### Data Enrichment and Integration

  - [Bidirectional HubSpot integration for pushing/pulling contacts](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Chrome extension for LinkedIn profile data capture](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Ability to enrich existing HubSpot data through Apollo](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Limitations on historical data import; focuses on new interactions within Apollo](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### Communication Tracking and Management

  - [Sequences for outreach management within Apollo](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Conversation logging for calls made through connected platforms (Zoom, Google Meet, Teams)](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Meeting scheduling similar to Calendly, with Google Calendar integration](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Lack of comprehensive contact summary across all touchpoints](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

### Pricing and Trial

  - [Annual pricing: $4,284 for 3 users (paid upfront)](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Quarterly option: $5,000/year](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Credit system: 1 credit per email, 8 credits per mobile number](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [10-day trial arranged for thorough evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Apollo to activate 10-day trial period for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Ron to send pricing structure and platform utilization links](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [George to explore Apollo during the weekend and demo to team members next week](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Evaluate Apollo's fit within GrowthX's tech stack and CRM needs](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Make decision on potential purchase after trial period](https://fathom.video/share/E_R_hTsWeuWe2qK_zSXMBJCbT5tgMxW4?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
